mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_record (student_id, course_id, chapter_id, progress, study_duration, last_position, completed, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{r.studentId}, #{r.courseId}, #{r.chapterId}, #{r.progress}, #{r.studyDuration}, #{r.lastPosition}, #{r.completed}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE progress = VALUES(progress), study_duration = study_duration + VALUES(study_duration), last_position = VALUES(last_position), completed = VALUES(completed), update_time = NOW()
